login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your profile and saved items.
login.adminSubtitle: Sign in with an admin account to access the admin panel.
login.googleSoon: Google sign-in will be available in a future update.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Register to save jobs, scholarships, and get alerts.
register.googleSoon: Google sign-up will be available in a future update.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.subtitleExtended: Enter the email address for your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists, you will receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.sentExtended: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly. The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.seoDescription: Set a new password for your EduRozgaar account.
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below. Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. Redirecting you to login...
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid reset link. Please use the link from your email or request a new one.

newsletter.description: Get daily or weekly alerts: new jobs, scholarships, and admission deadlines.

submitOpportunity.title: Submit an Opportunity
submitOpportunity.subtitle: Share a job, scholarship, or admission listing with our team.

employerLogin.seoDescription: Sign in to manage your job posts.

employerRegister.seoDescription: Create an employer account to post jobs.
